url.title: Home - HCARC KE5LOT
url.description: Home page for Hays-Caldwell Amateur Radio Club, serving amateur radio operators across Hays and Caldwell counties.

url.title: About - HCARC KE5LOT
url.description: Learn about Hays-Caldwell Amateur Radio Club, KE5LOT, including the club mission, meetings, officers, and brochure.

url.title: Learn More - HCARC KE5LOT
url.description: Find HCARC resources, club background, and links for ARRL and ARES amateur radio information.

url.title: Schedule - HCARC KE5LOT
url.description: View HCARC weekly activities, net control rotation, monthly meetings, and upcoming club events.

url.title: Moon Shot Field Day 2026 - HCARC KE5LOT
url.description: Event details for HCARC Moon Shot Field Day 2026, including date, time, location, and activities.

url.title: Membership Form - HCARC KE5LOT
url.description: Join Hays-Caldwell Amateur Radio Club using the online membership form or printable application.

url.title: Contact - HCARC KE5LOT
url.description: Contact HCARC officers, join the mailing list, connect on Discord, and find meeting location details.

url.title: Club Application Form - HCARC
url.description: Printable Hays-Caldwell Amateur Radio Club membership application form.
